zh.lifeSummary: 當Eleanor Basset於1325年出生在英國諾薩普頓史爾格亞特 威爾頓時，她的父親Ralph Basset25歲，母親Joan Latimer26歲。她於1347年與John Knyvet在英國結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1388年9月3日在英國英格蘭諾薩普頓史爾享年63歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭倫敦藍白斯聖 瑪麗 亞德。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Eleanor Basset于1325年出生在英国諾薩普頓史爾格亞特 威爾頓时，她的父亲Ralph Basset25岁，母亲Joan Latimer26岁。她于1347年与John Knyvet在英国结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1388年9月3日在英国英格兰諾薩普頓史爾享年63岁，埋葬在英国英格兰倫敦藍白斯聖 瑪麗 亞德。

nameMeanings.name: Basset
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: French: from a diminutive of Old French bas(se) ‘short, of low stature’ (see Bas ).
English: variant of   Bassett  , a cognate of 1 above.
In some cases also an altered form of French Besset (see Bessette 2). Compare Bassette 1.

variants.name: Bas
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Jose, Mauricio, Abelardo, Florencio, Francisco, Jorge, Luis, Manuel, Pedro, Soledad, Vicente.  Eastern Slavic Dmytro, Liya, Pyotr, Sergey.
Catalan: habitational name from a place so named in the district of La Garrotxa, Catalonia.
Basque: topographic name for someone who lived by a wood, from baso ‘wood, forest’.

nameMeanings.name: Eleanor
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French respelling of the Old Provençal name Alienor. This has sometimes been taken as a derivative of Helen , but it is more probably of Germanic derivation (the first element being ali ‘other, foreign’ the second is obscure). The name was introduced to England by Eleanor of Aquitaine ( 1122–1204 ), who came from Aquitaine in south-west France to be the wife of King Henry II . It was also borne by Eleanor of Provence, the wife of Henry III , and Eleanor of Castile, wife of Edward I .

variants.name: Ellenor
meanings: Variant spelling of   Eleanor  , the result of blending with   Ellen .

variants.name: Elenor
meanings: From an Old French respelling of the Old Provençal name Alienor. This has sometimes been taken as a derivative of Helen , but it is more probably of Germanic derivation (the first element being ali ‘other, foreign’ the second is obscure). The name was introduced to England by Eleanor of Aquitaine ( 1122–1204 ), who came from Aquitaine in south-west France to be the wife of King Henry II . It was also borne by Eleanor of Provence, the wife of Henry III , and Eleanor of Castile, wife of Edward I .

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Eleanor Basset was born in 1325, in Great Weldon, Northamptonshire, England, her father, Ralph Basset, was 25 and her mother, Joan Latimer, was 26. She married John Knyvet in 1347, in England. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 2 daughters. She died on 3 September 1388, in Northamptonshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 63, and was buried in Saint Mary Churchyard, Lambeth, London, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Eleanor Basset est née en 1325, à Great Weldon, Northamptonshire, Angleterre, son père, Ralph Basset, avait 25 ans et sa mère, Joan Latimer, avait 26 ans. Elle a épousé John Knyvet en 1347, à Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée le 3 septembre 1388, à Northamptonshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 63 ans, et a été enterrée à Saint Mary Churchyard, Lambeth, Londres, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

Sie hat 1347 in England John Knyvet geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb am 3. September 1388 im Alter von 63 Jahren in Northamptonshire, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Saint Mary Churchyard, Lambeth, London, England, United Kingdom begraben.

ko.Saint Mary' Churchyard, Southwick, North: 영국 잉글랜드 런던 램스 세인트 메리 c후르c히아어드
ko.lifeSummary: Eleanor Basset(이)가 1325년 영국 노르섬프토실르 그리트 웰던에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Ralph Basset(은)는 25세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Joan Latimer(은)는 26세였다. 그녀는 1347년 영국에서 John Knyvet(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1388년 9월 3일 영국 잉글랜드 노르섬프토실르에서 63세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 런던 램스 세인트 메리 c후르c히아어드에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Eleanor Basset nasceu em 1325, em Great Weldon, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Ralph Basset, tinha 25 anos e sua mãe, Joan Latimer, tinha 26 anos. Ela casou-se com John Knyvet em 1347, em Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 2 filhas. ru.Saint Mary' Churchyard, Southwick, North: сеинт мэри чурчярд, лэмбет, Лондон, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Eleanor Basset родилась в 1325 г. в местности грит велдон, нортамптоншир, Англия, её отцу по имени Ralph Basset было 25 лет, а матери, которую звали Joan Latimer, 26. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени John Knyvet в 1347 г. в местности Англия. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 2 дочери. Она умерла 3 сентября 1388 г. в местности нортамптоншир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 63 лет и была похоронена в местности сеинт мэри чурчярд, лэмбет, Лондон, Англия, Великобритания.

Murió el 3 de septiembre de 1388, en Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 63 años, y fue sepultada en Saint Mary Churchyard, Lambeth, London, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
